text.message: Bro you solo’d me on the wood and then wanted wood? Lol
i think you have the best spot
blue has all of the space on the bottom
Black you have a city and 3:1 port already. I’ve built two roads. Calm down
i haven o settle space tho
Yeah oj is look like more of the threat at the moment
i can trade when i get it
oh i thought it was red for some reason
he got it on the same 10 as you
i can't trade the second sorry
I’m out on roads then. Gg oj
I’m not going to just waste all my resources on roads for everyone else
